ksa_text: Knowledge of AI risk taxonomy, including model risk, algorithmic bias, opacity, adversarial vulnerability, data poisoning, training data integrity failures, systemic AI failure modes, performance risk, robustness risk, safety risk, privacy risk, and regulatory compliance risk.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI Governance is market-validated for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer. Final decision: include.
